title: platanthera fornicata var. atropatanica
intro: Platanthera fornicata var. atropatanica, also known as the Atropatan orchid, is a rare and lesser-known variant of the Platanthera fornicata species, a type of terrestrial orchid. This plant is believed to possess medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Ayurvedic medicine, where it is valued for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant qualities. The health benefits of Platanthera fornicata var. atropatanica include potential uses in treating various health conditions such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its purported ability to reduce stress and promote overall well-being. Herbal preparations of this plant typically involve drying and processing the roots and leaves, which can be made into teas, infusions, or capsules for internal use.
